narrative.narrative: The market is trapped in a fear-driven complacency, with the Fear & Greed Index plumbing 28 as 30-day Bitcoin momentum stalls, echoing the exhaustion seen before the August 2024 bottom. A weakening dollar is providing a subtle tailwind, but the sideways regime suggests this is a coiled spring absorbing pressure, not yet releasing it.
narrative.headline: Fear Grips the Coiled Spring

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc points to a resolution of this compression, historically favoring an upside breakout once fear peaks and momentum stabilizes, but the immediate story remains one of tense waiting.

consensus.key_reasoning: Score sits at ~50 in the Complacency band (47-54) and the 0% base rate of ±2+ point moves across 47 recent 12h windows makes this a textbook coil — a forced directional call is statistically reckless.
